gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved the duplicate-member wheel validation PR with no findings.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py -q
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Release bundles now reject duplicate non-directory file paths inside package wheel zip payloads before RECORD validation.
Wheel validation tests now cover duplicate document package, legacy package, and dist-info metadata members.
why: Strict V1 release bundles should not bless wheels whose duplicate archive members make RECORD provenance ambiguous.
